Video.summary: Jorja Johnson faces off against Simone Jardim in this match-up of the Women's Pro Single Quarterfinal.

Video.summary: Two of the sport’s biggest names meet in this Women’s Pro Singles pre-medal match at the 2023 US Open. Parris Todd and Simone Jardim bring elite-level strategy, precision, and intensity to the court in a pivotal semifinal showdown. Who will rise to the challenge and advance?
Video.title: US Open 2023 – Women’s Pro Singles Semifinal – Todd vs Jardim

Image.alt: US Open 2023 – Women’s Pro Singles Semifinal – Todd vs Jardim
US Open 2023 – Women’s Pro Singles Semifinal – Todd vs Jardim
US Open 2023 – Women’s Pro Singles Semifinal – Todd vs Jardim

Video.summary: Watch a masterclass in senior pro pickleball as Peter Prodanov and Scott Moore take on Scott Crandall and Jose Derisi. With explosive hands, strategic play, and experience driving every point, this US Open quarterfinal is a showcase of skill, grit, and high-level doubles tactics.
Video.title: US Open 2023 – Men’s Senior Pro Doubles Quarterfinal – Prodanov & Moore vs Crandall & Derisi

Image.alt: US Open 2023 – Men’s Senior Pro Doubles Quarterfinal – Prodanov & Moore vs Crandall & Derisi
US Open 2023 – Men’s Senior Pro Doubles Quarterfinal – Prodanov & Moore vs Crandall & Derisi
US Open 2023 – Men’s Senior Pro Doubles Quarterfinal – Prodanov & Moore vs Crandall & Derisi

Tuesday Night Pickleball - March 28, 2023 - AZ PBL
Tuesday Night Pickleball - March 28, 2023 - AZ PBL

Video.summary: Watch an exciting Mixed Split Pro Age match featuring the team of Scott Fliegelman and Jillian Braverman against Susannah Barr and Patrick Cote. Scott Fliegelman is a top-10 ranked Senior Pro and co-founder of Boulder Pickleball. His partner, Jillian Braverman, is a well-known professional pickleball player. They face the team of Susannah Barr and Patrick Cote, a pickleball pro and trainer. This match showcases high-level gameplay between four skilled pros.
Video.title: US Open 2025 - Mixed Split Pro Age - Fliegelman/Braverman vs. Bar/Cote

Image.alt: US Open 2025 - Mixed Split Pro Age - Fliegelman/Braverman vs. Bar/Cote
US Open 2025 - Mixed Split Pro Age - Fliegelman/Braverman vs. Bar/Cote
US Open 2025 - Mixed Split Pro Age - Fliegelman/Braverman vs. Bar/Cote

Video.summary: Live from the NCPA Virginia Beach Regional 2025, this fierce "Commonwealth Clash" features Virginia Tech taking on their in-state rivals, the University of Virginia (UVA). This pivotal pool play match is part of the fourth regional of the season, with teams vying for crucial seeding and a bid to the National Championship.The episode showcases intense action, starting with Women's Doubles, where UVA's Armelle Worrell and Mia Kim face off against Virginia Tech's Amelia Gaze and Heather Murphy. Later, watch the high-stakes Men's Singles match between Virginia Tech's Cody Miller, known for his reach and strategic placement, and UVA's Braden Cizek, who fights to keep his team in the series. With Virginia Tech leading 3-1 entering the singles match, every point counts.
Video.title: NCPA Virginia Beach Regional 2025 - Collegiate Team Match - Virginia Tech vs. UVA

Image.alt: NCPA Virginia Beach Regional 2025 - Collegiate Team Match - Virginia Tech vs. UVA
NCPA Virginia Beach Regional 2025 - Collegiate Team Match - Virginia Tech vs. UVA
NCPA Virginia Beach Regional 2025 - Collegiate Team Match - Virginia Tech vs. UVA

Video.title: NCPA Semifinals: Virginia Tech vs. Utah Tech

NCPA Semifinals: Virginia Tech vs. Utah Tech
NCPA Semifinals: Virginia Tech vs. Utah Tech

Video.summary: The World Pickleball League Season 2 continues its high-energy opening day at the Jio World Garden in Mumbai with a star-studded clash between Delhi Dilwale and the Chennai Super Champs. Watch as international stars like Delhi’s Max "Purple Jesus" Manthao and Chennai’s Hwang Nam Lee—a former Wimbledon junior doubles champion—bring world-class precision to the court. With celebrity co-owner Samantha cheering from the sidelines and strategic masterclasses from coach Wesley Gabrielsson, this tie features a gauntlet of intense Women’s Singles, Men's Singles, and high-speed Doubles matches. Experience every "Ernie" shot, tactical "pickle play," and the longest video challenge in league history as these two powerhouse teams battle for early-season dominance.
Video.title: WPBL 2026 - Delhi vs Chennai - Day 1 Tie 2

Image.alt: WPBL 2026 - Delhi vs Chennai - Day 1 Tie 2
WPBL 2026 - Delhi vs Chennai - Day 1 Tie 2
WPBL 2026 - Delhi vs Chennai - Day 1 Tie 2

Video.summary: The high-stakes action of Day 7 in the World Pickleball League (WPBL) features a decisive matchup between Pune United and the Delhi Dilwale. With the semi-final race tightening, both teams are fighting fiercely for vital points.
Video.title: WPBL 2025 - Pune vs. Delhi - Day 7 Tie 2

Image.alt: WPBL 2025 - Pune vs. Delhi - Day 7 Tie 2
WPBL 2025 - Pune vs. Delhi - Day 7 Tie 2
WPBL 2025 - Pune vs. Delhi - Day 7 Tie 2

Video.summary: Witness a high-stakes showdown on the final day of league competition as the undefeated Chennai Super Champs face off against a determined Pune United squad in a battle for postseason momentum. The atmosphere at Mumbai’s Jio World Garden is electric, featuring a "lip-smacking" women's singles battle between European stars Katie Morris and Dominika Turkovic. As Pune fights to stay alive in the tie, coach Rusty Sobeck looks for a breakthrough in a tactical mixed doubles clash against Jonny Goldberg’s top-tier rotation. From "stunning singles fight backs" to a strategic masterclass in doubles positioning, this tie showcases the intense grit required to challenge the league's only unbeaten titan.
Video.title: WPBL 2026 - Pune vs Chennai - Day 11 Tie 1

Image.alt: WPBL 2026 - Pune vs Chennai - Day 11 Tie 1
WPBL 2026 - Pune vs Chennai - Day 11 Tie 1
WPBL 2026 - Pune vs Chennai - Day 11 Tie 1

Video.summary: The penultimate day of World Pickleball League Season 2 heats up at Mumbai’s Jio World Garden with a high-stakes rematch of last year's semifinals between the Hyderabad Superstars and the Bengaluru Jawans. The spotlight shines on a "mouthwatering" women's singles clash between two unbeaten titans, Shawn Mendes and Katerina Stewart, where one historic winning streak is destined to end. From tactical mixed doubles experiments to the high-pressure debut of Eduardo Irizarry, every point is a desperate fight to stay "in the hunt" for a final spot. With commentators on the "edge of their seats" witnessing unbelievable defensive plays and "blistering" side outs, this tie is a masterclass in professional grit.
Video.title: WPBL 2026 - Hyderabad vs Bengaluru - Day 10 Tie 1

Image.alt: WPBL 2026 - Hyderabad vs Bengaluru - Day 10 Tie 1
WPBL 2026 - Hyderabad vs Bengaluru - Day 10 Tie 1
WPBL 2026 - Hyderabad vs Bengaluru - Day 10 Tie 1

Video.summary: Day 2 of the World Pickleball League (WPBL) kicks off with an exciting matchup between the Hyderabad Superstars and the Bengaluru team. This matchup begins with a highly anticipated Men's Singles match: Hyderabad's local talent, Kuldeep Mahajan, faces Bengaluru's Jack Foster from the United States.
Video.title: WPBL 2025 - Hyderabad vs. Bengaluru - Day 2 Tie 1

Image.alt: WPBL 2025 - Hyderabad vs. Bengaluru - Day 2 Tie 1
WPBL 2025 - Hyderabad vs. Bengaluru - Day 2 Tie 1
WPBL 2025 - Hyderabad vs. Bengaluru - Day 2 Tie 1

Video.summary: Texas duo Munro and Manzano take on Florida’s Foster and Chassang in the 2025 DUPR National Championship Men’s Doubles Final, battling for collegiate pickleball glory.
Video.title: Men's Doubles Final - Florida vs. Texas

Image.alt: Men's Doubles Final - Florida vs. Texas
Men's Doubles Final - Florida vs. Texas
Men's Doubles Final - Florida vs. Texas

Video.summary: This episode provides courtside commentary on Game 3 of the All Florida Pro League (AFPL) Stop 4 in Sarasota, Florida, featuring the Fort Myers Flamingos and the Old Town Bangers. The commentators highlight the aggressive play of newcomer Jada Bui and the defensive prowess of Ellie Schele. They also discuss the importance of mental toughness and team chemistry in a high-pressure environment. The episode concludes with a preview of the upcoming men's match.
Video.title: AFPL Stop 4 Championship Court - Game 3 - Old Town Bangers vs. Fort Myers Flamingos

Image.alt: AFPL Stop 4 Championship Court - Game 3 - Old Town Bangers vs. Fort Myers Flamingos
AFPL Stop 4 Championship Court - Game 3 - Old Town Bangers vs. Fort Myers Flamingos
AFPL Stop 4 Championship Court - Game 3 - Old Town Bangers vs. Fort Myers Flamingos

Video.summary: The US Open took place April 24-30, 2022 in Naples, FL. The Women's Doubles Final was a match up of Catherine Parenteau & Lea Jansen vs. Irina Tereschenko & Andrea Koop.
Video.title: US Open Pickleball Championships 2022 - Women's Pro Doubles Final

Image.alt: US Open Pickleball Championships 2022 - Women's Pro Doubles Final
US Open Pickleball Championships 2022 - Women's Pro Doubles Final
US Open Pickleball Championships 2022 - Women's Pro Doubles Final

Video.summary: Championship Court hosts a star-studded final as brothers Ben and Collin Johns take on Matt Wright and Riley Newman in this Men’s Pro Doubles finale. Packed with elite strategy, blistering hand battles, and dramatic swings, this is top-tier pickleball at its most intense.
Video.title: US Open 2022 – Men’s Pro Doubles Final – Johns & Johns vs Wright & Newman

Image.alt: US Open 2022 – Men’s Pro Doubles Final – Johns & Johns vs Wright & Newman
US Open 2022 – Men’s Pro Doubles Final – Johns & Johns vs Wright & Newman
US Open 2022 – Men’s Pro Doubles Final – Johns & Johns vs Wright & Newman
